note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

locationtown.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

divorcejudgment.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

order.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

importantnoticeto.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

name_of_obligor.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

sum.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

per.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

name_of_obligee.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

magistrate.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
